text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We receive news that Tamamo's father collapsed.
Immediately, we make an emergency trip to
Osaka, where Tamamo Cross makes a difficult
decision.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to retire from racing to look after her
family. However, when she breaks the news to
them, ironically, they are the ones who stop her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They explain that her running brings more hope
to her family than any efforts to support the
household could. Hearing this, Tamamo Cross
decides to continue her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head back to Tokyo, only to find Oguri Cap
waiting for us at the airport. When Tamamo Cross
considered quitting running, it was her face that
came to mind, so she vows to show Oguri Cap her
best run yet at the Takarazuka Kinen.
